title: 國小版-困難版-現在進行式-2026-06-11

questions.prompt: ____ the students reading books now?
questions.explanation: the students 是複數主詞，現在進行式疑問句要用 Are 開頭。

questions.prompt: Mia is not ____ dinner now.
questions.explanation: is not 後面仍然要接 V-ing，cook 的 ing 形是 cooking。

questions.prompt: The boys are ____ in the pool.
questions.explanation: swim 變成 ing 形時要雙寫 m，所以是 swimming。

questions.prompt: ____ your sister doing her homework now?
questions.explanation: your sister 是單數主詞，現在進行式疑問句要用 Is。

questions.prompt: We are not ____ games in class.
questions.explanation: are not 後面接 V-ing，正確答案是 playing。

questions.prompt: I ____ making a card for my teacher.
questions.explanation: 主詞 I 要搭配 am，make 去 e 加 ing 變成 making。

questions.prompt: The baby is ____ now.
questions.explanation: 現在進行式用 is 加 V-ing，cry 的 ing 形是 crying。

questions.prompt: Are they ____ the door now?
questions.explanation: Are they ...? 是現在進行式疑問句，動詞要用 opening。

questions.prompt: Ben ____ not running in the classroom.
questions.explanation: Ben 是單數主詞，現在進行式否定句要用 is not running。

questions.prompt: My mom is ____ a letter now.
questions.explanation: write 去 e 加 ing 變成 writing，所以選 writing。

questions.prompt: ____ Tom and Ben playing soccer now?
questions.explanation: Tom and Ben 是複數主詞，現在進行式疑問句用 Are。

questions.prompt: Lisa is not ____ TV now.
questions.explanation: is not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 watching。

questions.prompt: The dog ____ not sleeping now.
questions.explanation: The dog 是單數主詞，否定句要用 is not sleeping。

questions.prompt: Are the girls ____ in the classroom?
questions.explanation: Are 開頭的現在進行式疑問句中，動詞要用 dancing。

questions.prompt: I am not ____ my phone now.
questions.explanation: am not 後面接 V-ing，use 去 e 加 ing 變成 using。

questions.prompt: ____ your brother washing the dishes now?
questions.explanation: your brother 是單數主詞，現在進行式疑問句用 Is。

questions.prompt: They are not ____ English now.
questions.explanation: are not 後面接 V-ing，study 的 ing 形是 studying。

questions.prompt: The baby is ____ on the bed.
questions.explanation: sit 變 ing 要雙寫 t，所以是 sitting。

questions.prompt: ____ you listening to the teacher now?
questions.explanation: you 要搭配 are，疑問句是 Are you listening ...?

questions.prompt: Ben and Amy ____ not running in the hall.
questions.explanation: Ben and Amy 是複數主詞，否定句要用 are not running。

questions.prompt: My dad is ____ the car now.
questions.explanation: drive 去 e 加 ing 變成 driving。

questions.prompt: Is Lily ____ a picture now?
questions.explanation: Is 開頭的現在進行式疑問句中，動詞要用 drawing。

questions.prompt: We are not ____ lunch now.
questions.explanation: are not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 eating。

questions.prompt: The students ____ reading quietly now.
questions.explanation: The students 是複數主詞，現在進行式用 are reading。

questions.prompt: ____ your mom making dinner now?
questions.explanation: your mom 是單數主詞，疑問句要用 Is。

questions.prompt: He is not ____ his homework now.
questions.explanation: is not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 doing。

questions.prompt: Are they ____ bikes in the park?
questions.explanation: 現在進行式疑問句中，動詞要用 V-ing，所以選 riding。

questions.prompt: The cat is ____ milk now.
questions.explanation: is 後面接 V-ing，所以選 drinking。

questions.prompt: I ____ not playing games now.
questions.explanation: 主詞 I 的現在進行式否定句是 am not playing。

questions.prompt: ____ the teacher writing on the board?
questions.explanation: the teacher 是單數主詞，疑問句用 Is。

questions.prompt: The children are ____ in the playground.
questions.explanation: are 後面接 V-ing，所以選 running。

questions.prompt: She is not ____ a song now.
questions.explanation: is not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 singing。

questions.prompt: Are we ____ to the library now?
questions.explanation: Are we ...? 是現在進行式疑問句，動詞要用 going。

questions.prompt: Tom is ____ a big box.
questions.explanation: carry 的 ing 形是 carrying。

questions.prompt: You are not ____ carefully.
questions.explanation: are not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 listening。

questions.prompt: ____ Amy and Lisa cleaning the room now?
questions.explanation: Amy and Lisa 是複數主詞，疑問句要用 Are。

questions.prompt: My brother is ____ a kite now.
questions.explanation: fly 的 ing 形是 flying。

questions.prompt: They ____ not swimming today.
questions.explanation: They 是複數主詞，否定句要用 are not swimming。

questions.prompt: Is Ben ____ his teeth now?
questions.explanation: Is 開頭的現在進行式中，動詞要用 brushing。

questions.prompt: We are ____ a story now.
questions.explanation: are 後面接 V-ing，所以選 reading。

questions.prompt: ____ the dog jumping on the sofa?
questions.explanation: the dog 是單數主詞，現在進行式疑問句用 Is。

questions.prompt: Dad is not ____ coffee now.
questions.explanation: is not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 drinking。

questions.prompt: The boys are ____ at the bus stop.
questions.explanation: are 後面要接 V-ing，所以選 waiting。

questions.prompt: ____ I speaking too fast?
questions.explanation: 主詞 I 搭配 am，疑問句是 Am I speaking ...?

questions.prompt: Lisa is ____ her name on the paper.
questions.explanation: write 去 e 加 ing 變成 writing。

questions.prompt: The students are not ____ now.
questions.explanation: are not 後面接 V-ing，所以選 talking。

questions.prompt: Is your sister ____ water?
questions.explanation: Is 開頭的現在進行式中，動詞要用 drinking。

questions.prompt: I am ____ a sandwich now.
questions.explanation: make 去 e 加 ing 變成 making。

questions.prompt: Are the children ____ in the pool?
questions.explanation: swim 變 ing 要雙寫 m，所以是 swimming。

questions.prompt: Tom ____ not sitting here now.
questions.explanation: Tom 是單數主詞，否定句要用 is not sitting。
